project_type: Python ML Bridge trading system with MQ5 Expert Advisors for MetaTrader 5
test_framework: pytest with mock-heavy tests in python_bridge/tests/
verification_instructions: Run pytest on the test suite. 5 pre-existing candle pattern tests fail (known issue - candle blocking was intentionally disabled for M1 scalper mode). All new tests must pass.
environment_constraints: No MT5 terminal available. Validation is through pytest only. No Docker.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns: dataclass configs in settings.py, logging with logger.info/warning, numpy/pandas for calculations
key_patterns: SignalGenerator.generate_signal() is the main pipeline entry point. It checks momentum direction, gets ensemble predictions, detects regime, applies risk filters (S/R, RSI, HTF), then calculates SL/TP and lot size. RiskManager handles position sizing with Kelly criterion. Config uses @dataclass classes in settings.py. Bridge writes status via bridge.write_status(type, message). Tests use pytest fixtures with mock data.
directory_structure: python_bridge/ contains: config/ (settings.py), strategies/ (signal_generator.py, risk_manager.py, regime_detector.py, smart_exits.py), data/ (market_data.py, alternative_data.py, multi_timeframe.py, news_calendar.py, sentiment.py), models/ (ensemble.py, rl_agent.py), signals/ (bridge.py), dashboard/ (performance_tracker.py, dashboard_renderer.py), tests/, training/. Root has MQ5 EA files.
